title: Authority Model — Receipts, Evidence Chains, and Capability Ontology
context: Define the unified authority vocabulary and doctrine for Tribunus: what constitutes a receipt, how evidence chains are structured, the capability ontology governing all authorization decisions, the approval gate taxonomy, and the durable-before-ACK invariant that binds all authority claims to observable PGlite state. This ADR establishes the doctrinal foundation for campaigns 0009 (Authority and Auditability), 0018 (Security/Sandboxing), and 0019 (Supply Chain).
